{"capability_manifest": {"clientAge": {"field": "clientAge", "operators": ["EXISTS", "GTE", "LTE", "NOT_EXISTS", "RANGE"], "value_types": ["exists", "numeric"], "description": "表示客户本人年龄，不表示家庭成员年龄", "definition": "表示客户本人年龄，不表示家庭成员年龄", "enums": [], "unit": "岁，直接取数字，无需换算", "notes": "此字段仅支持GTE操作符，GT语义会被自动转换为GTE并对值+1后查询（例如：大于30岁→GTE 31岁，30岁以上→GTE 30岁）"}, "clientSex": {"field": "clientSex", "operators": ["EXISTS", "MATCH", "NOT_EXISTS"], "value_types": ["enum", "exists", "not_exists"], "description": "表示客户本人性别，不表示家庭成员、被保人、投保人性别", "definition": "表示客户本人性别，不表示家庭成员、被保人、投保人性别", "enums": [], "unit": "", "notes": ""}}, "semantic_equivalence_rules": {}, "value_mappings": {"clientSex": {"男性": "男", "女性": "女"}}, "enhanced_rules": {"rules": [{"name": "性别-枚举", "enum_ref": "clientSex", "patterns_template": ["{SEARCH}性别[为是：:]{enum}(?!.*(?:、|，|,|和|或|及|与|以及).*(?:{enum}))(?:的客户|客户)?", "{SEARCH}{enum}(?!.*(?:、|，|,|和|或|及|与|以及).*(?:{enum}))性(?:客户)?",
